name: Don Beyer
stanceSummary: Track AIPAC reports an Israel Lobby Total of $447,047 for Don Beyer in U.S. House, VA-08. Public statements and congressional records indicate this candidate has taken a stance aligned with Israel-focused security policy framing. This candidate has taken funding from the Israel lobby.

timeline.event: Track AIPAC congressional listing records Israel Lobby Total: $447,047.
